styleDescription: With an intrepid new look, the Khaki Navy Frogman Automatic is Hamilton’s most technically capable maritime-ready watch. Engineered for accuracy, legibility and endurance, the precision instrument brings the unfathomable power of the ocean to the wrist with a uniquely shaped crown protector and wave-look tactical rubber strap. It belongs to the Khaki Navy collection. The case is described as Stainless steel. The dial specification is Black. Its case is 46 mm in diameter. The published movement type is automatic, calibre H-10, with about 80 hours of reserve. Water resistance is rated to 300 metres. The crystal is sapphire.

model: Khaki Aviation X-WIND DAY DATE AUTO CHRONO
styleDescription: The 2018 Khaki X-Wind Auto Chrono Limited Edition is packed with technical aviation features for pilots including Hamilton’s ground-breaking drift angle calculator. Limited to just 1,918 pieces, it uses the H-21-Si, the first Hamilton chronograph movement with a silicon hairspring which has been precision certified by COSC as a chronometer. It belongs to the Khaki Aviation collection. The case is described as Stainless steel. The dial specification is Black. Its case is 45 mm in diameter. The published movement type is automatic, calibre H-21-Si, with about 60 hours of reserve. Water resistance is rated to 100 metres. The crystal is sapphire.

model: Khaki Navy Pioneer Small Second Auto
styleDescription: The new and exclusive H-32 automatic movement makes its impressive debut in the subtle and understated Khaki Navy Pioneer Small Second. The pocketwatch style case was inspired by Hamilton's 1940s marine chronometers and the rose gold PVD treatment adds a touch of class to a watch that's ready to set sail in the style stakes. It belongs to the Khaki Navy collection. The case is described as Stainless steel. The dial specification is Silver. Its case is 43 mm in diameter. The published movement type is automatic, calibre H-32, with about 38 hours of reserve. Water resistance is rated to 100 metres. The crystal is sapphire.

Innovative, adventurous and accurate. It's what pilots need in a timepiece and Hamilton always delivers. The Khaki X-Wind features the first ever drift angle calculator to appear in a watch and helps pilots accurately calculate how crosswinds will affect their journey. With a technical look and automatic movement that also suits urban aviators down to the ground it's the perfect everyday co-pilot. This new model has a 45mm case and adds a stealth element to its look with black PVD coating. It belongs to the Khaki Aviation collection. The case is described as Stainless steel. The dial specification is Black. Its case is 45 mm in diameter. The published movement type is automatic, calibre H-21, with about 60 hours of reserve. Water resistance is rated to 100 metres. The crystal is sapphire.

model: Khaki Aviation X-Wind Day Date Auto
styleDescription: Designed for pilots and built for adventure, the X-Wind flies through crosswinds in a bold new guise. It belongs to the Khaki Aviation collection. The case is described as Stainless steel. The dial specification is Green. Its case is 45 mm in diameter. The published movement type is automatic, calibre H-30, with about 80 hours of reserve. Water resistance is rated to 100 metres. The crystal is sapphire.

The original Hamilton Frogman was created for U.S. Naval 'Frogman' teams and featured in the 1951 smash-hit movie 'The Frogmen'. Almost 70 years have passed since then and watchmaking technology has come a long way. What hasn't changed are the vital features that made the watch as big a hit as the movie: Uni-directional rotating bezel, supreme water resistance and underwater luminescence. It belongs to the Khaki Navy collection. The case is described as Stainless steel. The dial specification is Black. Its case is 42 mm in diameter. The published movement type is automatic, calibre H-10, with about 80 hours of reserve. Water resistance is rated to 300 metres. The crystal is sapphire.

It may be limited to 1,999 individually numbered pieces, but that's the only limitation the Khaki Takeoff Auto Chrono knows. Count up with the chronograph movement or set the bi-directional turning flange to record a countdown. This is a technical take on a contemporary pilot's watch that was created to meet the needs of the Air Zermatt Swiss mountain rescue service- and it's ready for take off. It belongs to the Khaki Aviation collection. The case is described as Stainless steel. The dial specification is Black. Its case is 46 mm in diameter. The published movement type is automatic, calibre H-31, with about 60 hours of reserve. Water resistance is rated to 50 metres. The crystal is sapphire.

model: Khaki Aviation Takeoff Auto Chrono – Limited Edition
styleDescription: #html-body [data-pb-style=MJA5YG2]{justify-content:flex-start;display:flex;flex-direction:column;background-position:left top;background-size:cover;background-repeat:no-repeat;background-attachment:scroll}A special edition to celebrate the world record tunnel flight by Italian pilot Dario Costa. Powered by our H-31 automatic chronograph movement, the 46mm timepiece features a unique function designed to meet the needs of pilots: a removable case you can attach to a fixed dash mount. As a nod to the two tunnels Dario flew through at record speed, both sub dials feature yellow rings, and the 12 o’clock counter is adapted to a 15-minute countdown. Super-LumiNova® is only applied to the seconds hand and indicators through 43, commemorating Dario’s 43-second flight. Limited to 100 pieces, a reference to the maximum possible flying height (100cm) in both tunnels, each Takeoff comes with special packaging and a dash mount. It belongs to the Khaki Aviation collection. The case is described as Stainless steel. The dial specification is Black. Its case is 46 mm in diameter. The published movement type is automatic, calibre H-31, with about 60 hours of reserve. Water resistance is rated to 50 metres. The crystal is sapphire.

styleDescription: Patek Philippe has reinterpreted its famous self-winding Annual Calendar Reference 5396 (with double day/month aperture at 12 o'clock and date aperture at 6 o'clock) in a white gold version. The blue sunburst dial with black-gradient rim is discreetly enhanced by the sparkle of 12 baguette-cut diamond hour-markers – an elegant contrast highlighting the extremely understated, legible design. It belongs to the Complications collection. The published movement type is unknown. The crystal is unknown.

sourceSpecifications.name: marketingtext
sourceSpecifications.value: Patek Philippe has reinterpreted its famous self-winding Annual Calendar Reference 5396 (with double day/month aperture at 12 o'clock and date aperture at 6 o'clock) in a white gold version. The blue sunburst dial with black-gradient rim is discreetly enhanced by the sparkle of 12 baguette-cut diamond hour-markers – an elegant contrast highlighting the extremely understated, legible design.

styleDescription: With its double day-month aperture at 12 o'clock, date aperture at 6 o'clock and 24-hour subdial with moon phases, the self-winding Annual Calendar Reference 5396 has become one of Patek Philippe's greatest successes. It displays all its timeless elegance in this rose gold version, adorned with a silvery opaline dial bearing gold applied hour-markers and hands. It belongs to the Complications collection. The published movement type is unknown. The crystal is unknown.

sourceSpecifications.name: marketingtext
sourceSpecifications.value: With its double day-month aperture at 12 o'clock, date aperture at 6 o'clock and 24-hour subdial with moon phases, the self-winding Annual Calendar Reference 5396 has become one of Patek Philippe's greatest successes. It displays all its timeless elegance in this rose gold version, adorned with a silvery opaline dial bearing gold applied hour-markers and hands.

sourceSpecifications.name: marketingtitle
sourceSpecifications.value: A jewel of elegance and legibility

styleDescription: The latest generation of World Time models introduced to the current collection in 2024, this timepiece features a patented world first: a date display indexed to local time, i.e. that of the time zone selected at 12 o'clock and indicated by the central hands. The date is displayed on the dial flange by a red-tipped central glass hand. It belongs to the Complications collection. The published movement type is unknown. The crystal is unknown.

styleDescription: Patek Philippe has combined an Annual Calendar and Travel Time second time-zone display in a self-winding timepiece that always shows the exact date for local time. The Calatrava-type case is guilloched with a hobnail pattern around the caseband, while the vintage charcoal gray dial features a texture reminiscent of old-timer camera cases. It belongs to the Complications collection. The published movement type is unknown. The crystal is unknown.

sourceSpecifications.name: marketingtext
sourceSpecifications.value: Patek Philippe has combined an Annual Calendar and Travel Time second time-zone display in a self-winding timepiece that always shows the exact date for local time. The Calatrava-type case is guilloched with a hobnail pattern around the caseband, while the vintage charcoal gray dial features a texture reminiscent of old-timer camera cases.

styleDescription: Featuring instantaneous day-date displays jumping at midnight, this Calatrava is also distinguished by its eight-day power reserve. Its manually wound movement is equipped with a Pulsomax® escapement in Silinvar®. The entire rim of the round white gold case-middle is adorned with Patek Philippe's emblematic guilloché hobnail pattern. It belongs to the Complications collection. The published movement type is unknown. The crystal is unknown.

styleDescription: The Manufacture presents the first automaton wristwatch in its contemporary history, inspired by a pocket watch designed by Louis Cottier in 1958 that displays the hours and minutes on demand. Based on Jean de La Fontaine's fable The Crow and the Fox, the fascinating animation of time plays out on the surface of a rose gold Officer’s-style case and a brown “Matara” dial. It belongs to the Complications collection. The published movement type is unknown. The crystal is unknown.

styleDescription: A tribute to the precision clocks used in watchmaking workshops in the past, this rose gold self-winding Annual Calendar Regulator stands out with its vertical satin-brushed two-tone graphite and ebony black dial. Its high-tech regulating movement incorporates a Pulsomax® escapement and a Spiromax® balance-spring in Silinvar®: two developments from the Patek Philippe Advanced Research department. It belongs to the Complications collection. The published movement type is unknown. The crystal is unknown.

styleDescription: Patek Philippe pays tribute to the dynamism of Southeast Asia and Oceania in a white gold Rare Handcrafts World Time with a cloisonné Grand Feu enamel map representing that part of the world. The ultra-thin self-winding movement driving a city disk and a 24-hour disk with day/night zones enables the time to be read at will in all 24 time zones. It belongs to the Complications collection. The published movement type is unknown. The crystal is unknown.

styleDescription: This mechanical watch is made for new chapters and forward momentum. Whether you’re celebrating a hard-earned achievement or marking an important moment in life, this hand-wound timepiece in rich olive green will accompany you on every next step. Youthful, sporty, and highly versatile, it is a daily reminder that when it comes to success, you set your own timeline in life. Powered by precision mechanics, made in Glashütte, Germany. It belongs to the Club collection. The dial specification is olive green. Its case is 23.3 mm in diameter. The published movement type is unknown, calibre DUW 4001, manual, with about 53 hours of reserve. Water resistance is rated to 100 metres. The crystal is sapphire.

model: Traditionnelle Moon phase 83570/000R-H060 36 mm Pink Gold
styleDescription: Celebrating Vacheron Constantin’s 270th year of continuous operation, this 18K 5N pink gold watch is set with 80 round-cut diamonds. Centred on the dial is a moon phase that needs adjustment only once per 122 years, its a star-studded sky subtly echoed by the alligator strap. This watch, a limited release of 270 pieces, boasts a meticulously worked mother-of-pearl dial, decorated with a specially created Maltese cross pattern. Its manual-winding movement bears a discreet anniversary signature and a "côte unique" finish. The Traditionnelle Collection’s characteristic styling is found in the stepped, round case and lugs, slender bezel and fluted caseback, railway-type minute track and Dauphine-type hour and minute hands. It belongs to the Traditionnelle collection. The case is described as Alligator leather (Purple). Its case is 36 mm in diameter. The published movement type is unknown, with about 38 hours of reserve. Water resistance is rated to 30 metres. The crystal is unknown.

styleDescription: Understated yet sophisticated, this 18K 5N rose gold watch bears the iconic style of the Traditionnelle Collection - the grooved caseback and the railroad-style minute-counter. The dial displays a date aperture at 3 o’clock and small seconds at 9 o’clock. Its openworked caseback reveals an elevated oscillating weight in 22K gold, inspired by the Maltese cross. It belongs to the Traditionnelle collection. The case is described as Alligator leather (Brown). Its case is 38 mm in diameter. The published movement type is unknown, with about 40 hours of reserve. Water resistance is rated to 30 metres. The crystal is unknown.

styleDescription: An Art Deco classic reimagined for modern times, the American Classic Ardmore is a sophisticated choice for every day wear. Taking inspiration from the 1935 model, the case is curved to fit the wrist seamlessly, maintaining its versatile Art Deco appeal, with a running seconds subdial, Roman numerals, delicate proportions and high quality materials. It belongs to the American Classic collection. The case is described as Stainless steel. The dial specification is Silver. Its case is 19 mm in diameter. The published movement type is quartz, calibre 980.163. Water resistance is rated to 30 metres. The crystal is mineral.

The Ardmore collection has been a part of Hamilton heritage since it was first introduced in 1937. 80 years later and it hasn't aged a day. The latest models have been given a modern makeover to include a range of dial and strap designs. The new Ardmore is a versatile collection guaranteed to add a fascinating twist to your signature style. It belongs to the American Classic collection. The case is described as Stainless steel. The dial specification is Silver. Its case is 19 mm in diameter. The published movement type is quartz, calibre 980.153. Water resistance is rated to 30 metres. The crystal is mineral.

model: True Square X Kunihiko Morinaga Special Edition
styleDescription: Experience the perfect fusion of artistry and precision with the Rado True Square x Kunihiko Morinaga created together with the visionary Japanese fashion designer Kunihiko Morinaga. This remarkable timepiece features an admirable automatic Rado calibre R734, with 80-hour power reserve and antimagnetic Nivachron™ balance spring. Like the movement holder, it features circular grain decoration. With a 38 mm case size, the polished black high-tech ceramic case and crown exude a sleek and contemporary allure. The flat sapphire crystal, with anti-reflective coating on both sides, offers exceptional clarity. The transparent dial with photochromic effect makes the movement visible or invisible. When it is exposed to sunlight (UV rays), the True Square’s dial darkens. But as the sun goes down the dial shade evolves into grey and finally becomes transparent. The silver hands, enhanced with white veneer and white Super-LumiNova®, ensure excellent visibility, while adding a subtle touch of elegance. Completing the ensemble is the polished black high-tech ceramic bracelet, offering both comfort and durability. It belongs to the True collection. The case is described as High-Tech Ceramic. It is supplied on High-Tech Ceramic. Its case is 38 mm in diameter. The published movement type is automatic, calibre R734, with about 80 hours of reserve. The crystal is unknown.

model: True Square x Ash Barty Limited Edition
styleDescription: The 38 mm True Square Secret x Ash Barty was designed in collaboration with Ash Barty, the former world No. 1 women’s tennis player and Rado ambassador still to this day. This high-quality square watch with 80-hour power reserve is made with a polished light rose high-tech ceramic monobloc case. If you look closely, you will discover a small tennis ball on the white skeletonised mother-of-pearl dial. Ash’s signature is digitally printed on the sapphire crystal case back. This sporty timepiece celebrates Ash’s career and is limited to 996 pieces. It belongs to the True collection. The case is described as High-Tech Ceramic. It is supplied on Leather, Stainless steel / PVD. Its case is 38 mm in diameter. The published movement type is automatic, calibre R734, with about 80 hours of reserve. The crystal is unknown.

styleDescription: Korean actor and screen star Ji Chang-wook is a Rado global brand ambassador and co-designer of his own limited-edition True Square Open Heart. The elegant, matt black monobloc high-tech ceramic case holds a flat sapphire crystal glass with anti-reflective coating on both faces, offering illuminating views of the wide-open dial and its hour markers – 12 bright rubies with matching red Super-LumiNova® highlights on the hands. The black, open heart dial has nickel-coloured bevels and a fine, vertically brushed finish along with circular grain and Côtes de Genève decoration framed by a printed white minute track. The sandblasted titanium case back with smoked sapphire crystal presents the words LIMITED EDITION, ONE OUT OF 987, along with the Ji Chang-wook’s signature, all in white. This stunning new model is powered by Rado calibre R734, a 25-jewel, 3-hand automatic that exceeds standard test requirements and features an anti-magnetic Nivachron™ hairspring and a remarkable 80-hour power reserve. Water-resistant to 5 bar (50 m). It belongs to the True collection. Its case is 38 mm in diameter. The published movement type is automatic, calibre R734, with about 80 hours of reserve. The crystal is unknown.

The Rado True Square Skeleton unites complex high-tech materials and ultra fine craftsmanship. Housed in a 38 mm matte black high-tech ceramic monobloc case, the R808 skeleton movement is equipped with 25 jewels and offers an 80-hour power reserve. Rigorously tested in five positions, it features an antimagnetic Nivachron™ hairspring and horizontal Côtes de Genève decorations on the dial side, making this movement a pure demonstration of the Swiss legacy in high-precision engineering. Crowned by a flat sapphire crystal, the dial is a symphony of layered craftsmanship. The black sandblasted skeletonised top plate hovers above the lower plate. On this top layer, white SuperLumiNova® indexes and meticulously printed white minute markers are precisely positioned, providing sharp legibility against the dark background. Beneath, the lower plate reveals refined horizontal horizontal Côtes de Genève decorations in perfect harmony with the movement. At 4 o’clock, the iconic rotating rhodium-coloured anchor completes this dynamic and multi-dimensional display. Completing the case is a black rubber strap, which flows seamlessly into a stainless steel extendable folding clasp with a cover made in matte high-tech ceramic. It belongs to the True collection. The case is described as High-Tech Ceramic. It is supplied on Caoutchouc / Rubber. Its case is 38 mm in diameter. The published movement type is automatic, calibre R808, with about 80 hours of reserve. The crystal is unknown.

styleDescription: The Rado True Square open heart unites complex high-tech materials and ultra fine craftsmanship. The 38mm polished rose high-tech ceramic monobloc case is lightweight, hypoallergenic with exceptional hardness and durability, rated at 1,250 Vickers. It forms a resilient case for the calibre R734, equipped with 25 jewels, an 80-hour power reserve and an antimagnetic Nivachron™ hairspring. Crowned by a flat sapphire crystal, the dial reveals an open heart architecture that showcases the inner workings with refined clarity. The rose sunray dial is precisely sculpted, its bevelled apertures framed in matching rose gold tones to accentuate the mechanical beauty beneath. Rose gold coloured applied indexes filled with white Super-LumiNova are complemented by finely printed grey minute markers, achieving a harmonious and precise composition. Visible through the open section, the movement holder is adorned with Côtes de Genève, while the dial side of the movement features elegant circular graining. Slightly above the three o’clock position, the iconic rotating anchor in rose gold brings a dynamic touch to this display of horological finesse. Completing the case design is a polished rose high-tech ceramic bracelet, which is secured by a titanium 3-fold clasp, delivering the exceptional wearing comfort that high-tech ceramic provides. It belongs to the True collection. The case is described as High-Tech Ceramic. It is supplied on High-Tech Ceramic. Its case is 38 mm in diameter. The published movement type is automatic, calibre R734, with about 80 hours of reserve. The crystal is unknown.

model: True Square Automatic Open Heart Sparkling
styleDescription: This Rado True Square Open Heart lights up with top-class diamonds, a sparkling new dial and a monobloc square case in polished plasma high-tech ceramic. A sapphire crystal glass adds lustre to the dial with 12 diamond indexes and a rhodium-coloured diamond powder-like finish. A low-relief grey minute track circles yellow gold-coloured hour and minute hands with Super-LumiNova® highlights, and a yellow gold-coloured second hand. Cut-away windows draw the eye into the heart of the watch, where the Rado calibre R734 automatic movement delivers reliable accuracy with an anti-magnetic NivachronTM hairspring and a remarkable 80-hour power reserve. The dial was developed using a unique electro-forming process that produces a diamond-powder like finish and permits the Rado logo, markings and minute tracks to be raised in relief from the base of the dial, the end result of galvanic growth. Polished plasma high-tech ceramic, a dazzling dial and 12 jubilé diamonds combine to create irresistible luxury and elegance. It belongs to the True collection. The case is described as Plasma High-Tech Ceramic. Its case is 38 mm in diameter. The published movement type is automatic, calibre R734, with about 80 hours of reserve. The crystal is unknown.

model: True Square Automatic Open Heart Sparkling
styleDescription: Top-class diamonds and a sparkling dial bring a fresh look to this dazzling True Square Open Heart. The iconic square case and bracelet in polished white high-tech ceramic frame an innovative new dial with a rhodium-coloured diamond powder-like finish. A unique electro-forming process produces the dial’s diamond-powder like glitter and permits the Rado logo, markings and minute tracks to be raised in sharp relief from the base of the dial, the end result of galvanic growth. The sparkling dial and 12 jubilé diamond indexes combine to create this model’s dazzling, elegant and luxurious look. A low-relief grey minute track surrounds rose gold-coloured hour and minute hands with Super-LumiNova® highlights and a rose gold-coloured second hand. The intriguing cut-away design invites a close-up look at the Rado calibre R734, a 25-jewel, 3-hand automatic movement with an anti-magnetic NivachronTM hairspring and a remarkable 80-hour power reserve. It belongs to the True collection. The case is described as High-Tech Ceramic. Its case is 38 mm in diameter. The published movement type is automatic, calibre R734, with about 80 hours of reserve. The crystal is unknown.

An anti-reflective coating on both faces of the crystal gives a clear view of the dial, which is laser engraved with an abstract representation of the concrete surface texture of the Palace of Assembly in Chandigarh, India. The Rado logo is vertical at 8 o’clock. Designed to be complementary, the hands feature other colours from the Polychromie Architecturale: ORANGE VIF (4320S), VERT 59 (4320G) and VERT OLIVE (4320F). sourceSpecifications.name: care
sourceSpecifications.value: Avoid placing your watch near devices generating strong magnetic fields,When possible avoid any impact that might damage your watch,Avoid exposing your watch to extreme temperatures or temperature variations,Avoid direct contact with solvents, detergents, perfumes, mosquito repellent or any chemicals, since they may damage your watch’s components,If the text “WATER RESISTANT” or symbol appears on the case-back, the water resistance of your watch has been tested to a depth of approximately 30 meters. However, the absolute water resistance of a watch may not be permanently guaranteed. It may be affected by ageing of the gaskets, accidental impact on the crown or crystal and other external factors. We recommend having your watch’s water resistance tested by a Gucci service center once a year,Gold watches are a creation crafted at the time: each piece is authentically individual and unique. For this reason, please take into consideration that the pieces are not water resistant and for no reason should be immersed into the water or rinsed,Make sure that the crown is always pushed back into the normal running position, to prevent moisture or dust penetrating into the case,Never operate the crown or chronograph push-buttons when the watch is wet or underwater to prevent water penetrating into the case,Use soapy water and a soft brush for cleaning metal, PVD and ceramic bracelets, rubber, acetate and water resistant cases. Rinse with clean water to eliminate washing residue. Never use cleaning agents. sourceSpecifications.name: care
sourceSpecifications.value: Avoid placing your watch near devices generating strong magnetic fields,When possible avoid any impact that might damage your watch,Avoid exposing your watch to extreme temperatures or temperature variations,Avoid direct contact with solvents, detergents, perfumes, mosquito repellent or any chemicals, since they may damage your watch’s components,If the text “WATER RESISTANT” or symbol appears on the case-back, the water resistance of your watch has been tested to a depth of approximately 30 meters. However, the absolute water resistance of a watch may not be permanently guaranteed. It may be affected by ageing of the gaskets, accidental impact on the crown or crystal and other external factors. We recommend having your watch’s water resistance tested by a Gucci service center once a year,Gold watches are a creation crafted at the time: each piece is authentically individual and unique. For this reason, please take into consideration that the pieces are not water resistant and for no reason should be immersed into the water or rinsed,Make sure that the crown is always pushed back into the normal running position, to prevent moisture or dust penetrating into the case,Never operate the crown or chronograph push-buttons when the watch is wet or underwater to prevent water penetrating into the case,Use soapy water and a soft brush for cleaning metal, PVD and ceramic bracelets, rubber, acetate and water resistant cases. Rinse with clean water to eliminate washing residue. Never use cleaning agents. Wipe down with a soft cloth,Always rinse your watch in lukewarm water after use in a saline or chlorinated environment (sea water, swimming pool),It is advised to change the battery as soon as it is drained or spent as it may leak, which would damage the movement and the internal components of your watch,To care for leather, exotic and fabric straps: Since these materials are natural, be sure to protect your strap from prolonged exposure to the sun and moisture, so as not to alter its shape and color. Watches containing these materials should not be used underwater.

model: Superocean Heritage B01 Chronograph 44 Limited Edition
styleDescription: Inspired by the original Superocean from the 1950s, the Superocean Heritage combines iconic design features with a modern touch. Sporty and elegant, the Superocean Heritage is a true embodiment of style at sea. Featuring the iconic triangular-shaped hands as well as a unidirectional bezel with a polished ceramic ring, the Superocean Heritage is an elegant looking diver’s watch. Limited to 500 pieces, this Superocean Heritage B01 Chronograph 44 features a range stainless steel & 18k red gold case and a green dial. Offered with a black “mesh-styled” rubber strap fitting a folding buckle, this Superocean Heritage is powered by the in-house Breitling Manufacture Caliber 01, a COSC-certified chronometer. It belongs to the Superocean Heritage collection. The case is described as Stainless steel & 18k red gold. The dial specification is Green. It is supplied on Rubber. The published movement type is automatic, calibre Breitling 01 (Manufacture), with about 70 hours of reserve. Water resistance is rated to 200 metres. The crystal is sapphire.

The Superocean Heritage ’57 Capsule collection pays tribute to the original 1957 SuperOcean and the cool, laid-back surfing lifestyle of the 1960s. This colorful variation comes in a limited edition of 1000 pieces. The 42 mm stainless-steel case features two signature elements of the original SuperOcean: a concave bidirectional ceramic bezel and a dial featuring oversized indices. Paired with a mesh bracelet or a gold brown calfskin leather strap that fits both a stainless-steel pin or folding buckle, this colorful Superocean Heritage ‘57 is powered by the Breitling Caliber 10, a COSC-certified chronometer. The published movement type is automatic, calibre Breitling 10, with about 42 hours of reserve. Water resistance is rated to 100 metres. The crystal is sapphire.

Breitling’s 1950s-era SuperOcean dive watch was designed to take its wearers from sea to shore in style. Now, the new Superocean Heritage '57 Highlands Collection invites Breitling fans on a new coastal journey: Exploring the rocky shores and misty peaks of the Scottish Highlands. The pieces come at a 38 mm diameter, featuring the vibrant earth toned dial colors of beige, green, mustard, and blue. Like their vintage SuperOcean predecessor, they feature several design elements from the 1957 original such as the concave ceramic bezel, oversized indexes, and arrow-shaped hour hand. One distinctly Scottish detail: a tweed-inspired fabric strap, made of a sumptuous blend of silk and wool. All the watches come on a metal mesh bracelet, while the complementary fabric strap is provided in a separate pouch, along with a springboard tool for easy switches. For those who like to mix and match, an additional blue strap can be purchased separately. So whether you’re out strolling a craggy shoreline, taking shelter in a country inn, or just navigating your daily life, the Superocean Heritage ’57 Highlands Capsule Collection is all about facing the elements—fashionably. It belongs to the Superocean Heritage collection. The case is described as Stainless steel & 18k red gold. The dial specification is Beige. It is supplied on Stainless steel. The published movement type is automatic, calibre Breitling 10, with about 42 hours of reserve. Water resistance is rated to 100 metres. The crystal is sapphire.

Designed to be both a lightweight timepiece for athletes and a casual, everyday sports chronograph, the Endurance Pro perfectly blends innovative technology with a vibrant design to produce the ultimate athleisure watch. Designed for men and women whose active lives combine a professional mindset with a sporty lifestyle, the Endurance Pro is up to the challenges of a rigorous workout, but fashionable enough for everyday wear. The Endurance Pro features an ultra-light Breitlight® case, a robust material 3.3 times lighter than titanium and 5.8 times lighter than stainless steel. Non-magnetic, thermally stable and hypoallergenic, Breitlight® is highly resistant to scratches, traction and corrosion. It also has a feel that is warmer than metal and a slightly textured effect, accentuating the originality of the design. Exclusive to Breitling, the material is 100-percent Swiss-made. In 44 mm or 38 mm, the Endurance Pro is available to athletes with a multitude of colorful dials and rubber straps all fitting a Breitlight® tang-type buckle. The two sizes are respectively powered by Breitling’s Caliber 82 and 83, both COSC-certified SuperQuartz™ chronographs delivering exceptional precision. It belongs to the Professional collection. The case is described as Breitlight®. The dial specification is Black. It is supplied on Rubber. The published movement type is quartz, calibre Breitling 82. Water resistance is rated to 100 metres. The crystal is sapphire.

model: Endurance Pro 44 NFL Chicago Bears Edition
styleDescription: A match-up as exciting as Super Bowl. Breitling, the Official Timepiece Partner of the NFL, celebrates all 32 teams with the Endurance Pro NFL Team Editions. Crafted from ultra-light titanium, each 44 mm chronograph features your team’s logo in the subdial at 6 o’clock, a solar compass, and a pulsometer scale in team colors—ready for every spike in heart rate when the game heats up. The NFL shield is engraved on the caseback, and every watch comes on a comfortable, water-resistant rubber strap. The Endurance Pro blends high-performance features with bold design to create the ultimate athleisure watch. There's a reason we call our Endurance Pro “the ultimate athleisure watch.” It's because it can make the rounds from class to work to the gym without missing a beat. (Sound like a soon-to-be grad you know?) First developed for triathletes, the Endurance Pro went on to become a favorite of those looking for an easygoing everyday chronograph that scores top marks for style. The Stanford® University Edition is a limited edition of 150 pieces. It proudly displays its academic pride with Cardinal™ Red and White colors, complemented by the university seal engraved on the caseback. The Endurance Pro features an ultra-light Breitlight® case, a robust material 3.3 times lighter than titanium and 5.8 times lighter than stainless steel. Non-magnetic, thermally stable and hypoallergenic, Breitlight® is highly resistant to scratches, traction and corrosion. It also has a touch that is warmer than metal and a slightly textured effect accentuating the originality of the design. Exclusive to Breitling, it is 100% Swiss-made. Powering the Endurance Pro is Breitling’s Caliber 82, a COSC-certified SuperQuartz™ chronograph delivering exceptional precision. It belongs to the Professional collection. The case is described as Breitlight®. The dial specification is Black. It is supplied on Rubber. The published movement type is quartz, calibre Breitling 82. Water resistance is rated to 100 metres. The crystal is sapphire.

Breitling’s IRONMAN® 70.3 World Championship edition ultra-lightweight Endurance Pro watch. On your toughest stretches and your steepest climbs, what drives you to push to the finish? You have the mental ammunition to keep you going. Let your Endurance Pro IRONMAN® edition be another tool in your arsenal. The Endurance Pro was designed for elite triathletes, but works just as well as a stylish sports chronograph for everyday wear. It’s made of Breitlight®, a robust material 3.3 times lighter than titanium and 5.8 times lighter than stainless steel. It’s also thermally stable (with a touch that’s warmer than metal), while being scratch-resistant, non-magnetic and hypo-allergenic. With its rubber strap and 100 m water resistance, the Endurance Pro IRONMAN performs just as well in water as it does on land. And each one is powered by Breitling’s Caliber 82, a COSC-certified SuperQuartz™ movement that provides exceptional accuracy. Combine that with its easy readability, chronograph function and solar compass, and you have a powerful motivator for crossing the finish line. Limited to just 300 pieces, this unique collectable edition features the distinctive IRONMAN® 70.3 World Championship design and color scheme. Make this performance watch a reward for your achievement or let it be your incentive to conquer the challenge ahead. Either way, it’s a keepsake that will serve as a constant reminder of all that you put in to become an IRONMAN. It belongs to the Professional collection. The case is described as Breitlight®. The dial specification is Anthracite. It is supplied on Rubber. The published movement type is quartz, calibre Breitling 82. Water resistance is rated to 100 metres. The crystal is sapphire.

Designed for men and women whose active lives combine a professional mindset with a sporty lifestyle, the Endurance Pro is up to the challenges of a rigorous workout, but fashionable enough for everyday wear. The Endurance Pro features an ultra-light Breitlight® case, a robust material 3.3 times lighter than titanium and 5.8 times lighter than stainless steel. Non-magnetic, thermally stable and hypoallergenic, Breitlight® is highly resistant to scratches, traction and corrosion. It also has a feel that is warmer than metal and a slightly textured effect, accentuating the originality of the design. Exclusive to Breitling, the material is 100-percent Swiss-made. In 44 mm or 38 mm, the Endurance Pro is available to athletes with a multitude of colorful dials and rubber straps all fitting a Breitlight® tang-type buckle. The two sizes are respectively powered by Breitling’s Caliber 82 and 83, both COSC-certified SuperQuartz™ chronographs delivering exceptional precision. It belongs to the Professional collection. The case is described as Breitlight®. The dial specification is Blue. It is supplied on Rubber. The published movement type is quartz, calibre Breitling 82. Water resistance is rated to 100 metres. The crystal is sapphire.

There's a reason we call our Endurance Pro “the ultimate athleisure watch.” It's because it can make the rounds from class to work to the gym without missing a beat. (Sound like a soon-to-be grad you know?) First developed for triathletes, the Endurance Pro went on to become a favorite of those looking for an easygoing everyday chronograph that scores top marks for style. The University of Michigan™ edition shows its academic pride with the Maize and Blue colors and university seal engraved on the caseback. The Endurance Pro features an ultra-light Breitlight® case, a robust material 3.3 times lighter than titanium and 5.8 times lighter than stainless steel. Non-magnetic, thermally stable and hypoallergenic, Breitlight® is highly resistant to scratches, traction and corrosion. It also has a touch that is warmer than metal and a slightly textured effect accentuating the originality of the design. Exclusive to Breitling, it is 100% Swiss-made. Powering the Endurance Pro is Breitling’s Caliber 82, a COSC-certified SuperQuartz™ chronograph delivering exceptional precision. It belongs to the Professional collection. The case is described as Breitlight®. The dial specification is Black. It is supplied on Rubber. The published movement type is quartz, calibre Breitling 82. Water resistance is rated to 100 metres. The crystal is sapphire.

On your toughest stretches and your steepest climbs, what drives you to push to the finish? You have the mental ammunition to keep you going. Let your Endurance Pro IRONMAN® edition be another tool in your arsenal. The Endurance Pro was designed for elite triathletes, but works just as well as a stylish sports chronograph for everyday wear. With its rubber strap and 100 m water resistance, the Endurance Pro IRONMAN performs just as well in water as it does on land. And each one is powered by Breitling’s Caliber 82, a COSC-certified SuperQuartz™ movement that delivers exceptional accuracy. Combine that with its easy readability, chronograph function, pulsometer scale, and solar compass, and you have a powerful motivator for crossing the finish line. Limited to just 500 pieces, this unique collectible edition is our premium Endurance Pro model. Its distinctive design features the IRONMAN® World Championship logo and color scheme, and it’s the first to be made of titanium, a robust material that’s 43% lighter than stainless steel. Make this performance watch a reward for your achievement or let it be your incentive to conquer the challenge ahead. Either way, it’s a keepsake that will serve as a constant reminder of all that you put into becoming an IRONMAN. It belongs to the Professional collection. The case is described as Titanium. The dial specification is Anthracite. It is supplied on Rubber. The published movement type is quartz, calibre Breitling 82. Water resistance is rated to 100 metres. The crystal is sapphire.
